name: New personality format
description:
I've made a personality format for you guys to copy via bot and i recently made a new one so i thought I'd just upload the new one here. Its alot more token efficient incase most people use JJLM still instead of proxy which has a hard time keeping up with so much information on a bot.

It looks the same but im too lazy to type out what you should do different so if you're interested in actually making a bot with this format my previous bot shows what's different.

Update: I just added ethnicity nothing too big I just wanted a reason to change the old image tbh.
creator: 868_jazzy
